items.title: [100% Remoto]  - Python Developer - BotCity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

Company Overview

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the worldвҖҷs top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

WeвҖҷre a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If youвҖҷre looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, weвҖҷd love for you to join us on this journey.

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

The Python Developer will be responsible for design, develop, and deliver automation projects that ensure performance, scalability, and customer impact for BotCityвҖҷs clients. This role is critical to maintaining high-quality code, smooth delivery, and strong customer experience across Professional Services engagements. The ideal professional is a passionate Python developer who builds clean, reliable automation solutions, communicates effectively while prioritizing the customer experience, and thrives as a collaborative, adaptable team player in a fast-changing environment.  This role reports to the Delivery Manager.

## Local

Oportunidade 100% Remota.

## Requisitos

- BachelorвҖҷs degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
- Professional experience (2+ years) in Python development.
- Relevant hands-on experience with automation or RPA projects.
- Proven experience with Git version control system and GitHub Flow.
- Solid understanding of APIs, data manipulation, error handling, and debugging.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to adapt quickly to new business contexts.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills with clients and internal stakeholders.
- Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion, Slack.
- Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
- Portuguese - Fluent.
- English - Advanced.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in professional services, IT consulting, or technical implementation.
- Familiarity with BotCity tools.
- Experience with Agile methodologies.
- Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.

## BenefГӯcios

Competitive compensation.
Paid time off (30 days per year).
100% remote and flexible hours.
Caju benefits card.
Conexa health benefits.
Opportunity to work in a global team with teams in San Francisco and SГЈo Paulo.

## ContrataГ§ГЈo

ContrataГ§ГЈo PJ

## Como se candidatar

items.description:
### рҹҺҜ Cargo

Platform Engineer SГӘnior (DevOps) / Especialista em Infraestrutura e Plataforma

### рҹҸў Empresa

OZmap 

### рҹ“Ҡ NГӯvel de ExperiГӘncia

SГӘnior

### рҹҸ  Modalidade de Trabalho

Remoto

### рҹ“Қ LocalizaГ§ГЈo

FlorianГіpolis (SC)

### рҹ“қ Tipo de ContrataГ§ГЈo

CLT ou PJ

### рҹ’ұ Moeda

BRL

### рҹ’° Faixa Salarial

18.000 - 20.000 (negociГЎvel)

### рҹ“Ӣ DescriГ§ГЈo da Vaga

Se vocГӘ constrГіi a base da plataforma e nГЈo apenas opera a que jГЎ existe, gosta de entender o que acontece por baixo da abstraГ§ГЈo e Г© a pessoa que assume os problemas que ninguГ©m mais resolve em produГ§ГЈo, essa vaga Г© para vocГӘ.

Para vocГӘ entender nosso contexto: nossa stack roda em AWS EC2 com componentes autogerenciados: nГЈo Г© uma operaГ§ГЈo Kubernetes gerenciada. O dia a dia Г© operar a primitiva: Linux, redes, proxy reverso, observabilidade open-source. Se a sua experiГӘncia Г© mais na camada de configuraГ§ГЈo de serviГ§os gerenciados, sem ter operado o que estГЎ por baixo, talvez nГЈo seja o encaixe mais aderente neste momento e isso nГЈo diz nada sobre o seu valor como profissional.

Sobre a Ozmap рҹ’ҡ

Somos uma empresa de tecnologia especializada em planejamento, gestГЈo e documentaГ§ГЈo de redes de telecomunicaГ§Гөes. Nossa plataforma ajuda provedores de internet e operadores de telecom a projetar, expandir e operar suas redes, o que significa que confiabilidade nГЈo Г© abstrata aqui: quando algo cai, redes reais de clientes reais sentem. Estamos em crescimento, com atuaГ§ГЈo internacional e desafios constantes de escala, criticidade e evoluГ§ГЈo de produto.

Problemas, aqui, nГЈo sГЈo ignorados nem empurrados para frente: sГЈo discutidos, investigados e transformados em melhoria concreta. Nossa cultura Г© autonomia, senso de dono, comunicaГ§ГЈo transparente e aprendizado contГӯnuo.

рҹҡҖ O Que VocГӘ Vai Encontrar Por Aqui

EspaГ§o para atuar de forma estratГ©gica e prГЎtica: construir observabilidade do zero, evoluir a entrega contГӯnua, conduzir as investigaГ§Гөes complexas de produГ§ГЈo e influenciar tecnicamente os times de desenvolvimento. Mais do que manter ambientes, queremos quem ajude a definir os prГіximos passos da nossa engenharia.

рҹҡ© O que vocГӘ vai fazer

Projetar, operar e evoluir ambientes AWS (EC2) e on-premises com containers (Docker), garantindo disponibilidade, seguranГ§a e escalabilidade;
Operar e administrar ambientes Linux em produГ§ГЈo (systemd, tuning de kernel/rede, I/O, troubleshooting de processo);
Construir e evoluir pipelines de CI/CD do zero, com gates de qualidade e seguranГ§a;
Desenvolver observabilidade ponta a ponta (instrumentaГ§ГЈo, exporters, PromQL, SLI/SLO, alertas);
Conduzir troubleshooting avanГ§ado, RCA e post-mortem blameless вҖ” com mudanГ§a estrutural depois, nГЈo sГі o relatГіrio;
Implementar automaГ§ГЈo via Infraestrutura como CГіdigo;
Analisar e otimizar custos em cloud: rightsizing, anГЎlise de uso e proposta de alternativas com dados.
Ser referГӘncia tГ©cnica para devs e engenheiros, influenciando arquitetura sem depender de autoridade formal.

### вң… Requisitos TГ©cnicos

```markdown
рҹ”Қ O que esperamos de vocГӘ:

O que define o nГӯvel desta vaga Г© profundidade + protagonismo. Buscamos quem construiu do zero, definiu a arquitetura, liderou tecnicamente, foi responsГЎvel por, resolveu o incidente que ninguГ©m resolvia. Menos sobre ter feito parte de times que fizeram isso, e mais sobre o que vocГӘ conduziu na linha de frente. A senioridade serГЎ avaliada pela complexidade do que vocГӘ resolveu e pela responsabilidade que assumiu, comprovada por histГіria concreta de mГЈo na massa, mais do que por uma lista de ferramentas.

ObrigatГіrio: experiГӘncia operando a primitiva em produГ§ГЈo:

 AWS (~4+ anos): EC2, VPC/redes, IAM e seguranГ§a: EC2, VPC/redes, IAM e seguranГ§a вҖ” operaГ§ГЈo e decisГЈo tГ©cnica em produГ§ГЈo; certificaГ§ГЈo Г© bem-vinda, mas, sozinha, nГЈo substitui essa vivГӘncia;
Linux e redes (~4+ anos): administraГ§ГЈo de servidores, troubleshooting em produГ§ГЈo вҖ” disco cheio, OOM killer, diagnГіstico de rede. Processos, memГіria e I/O;
CI/CD construГӯdo do zero (~3+ anos): pipelines criados e evoluГӯdos por vocГӘ (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, runners self-hosted, secrets, cache, gates) ;
Observabilidade open-source ponta a ponta (~2+ anos): Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, VictoriaMetrics ou equivalentes вҖ” configurados e mantidos por vocГӘ, nГЈo sГі utilizados.
OpenTelemetry вҖ” com instrumentaГ§ГЈo, exporters, PromQL e definiГ§ГЈo de SLI/SLO;
OperaГ§ГЈo sob a camada gerenciada: histГіrico concreto com nginx/HAProxy/Envoy, Linux por baixo, e resoluГ§ГЈo de incidentes crГӯticos que vocГӘ conduziu.
Docker: Docker em produГ§ГЈo (~3+ anos): operaГ§ГЈo real de containers em ambientes crГӯticos вҖ” volumes, redes, recursos, encerramento controlado de serviГ§os.

Perfil

Autonomia alta: recebe um problema ambГӯguo ("nossa observabilidade estГЎ fraca") e entrega ponta a ponta;
Ownership e proatividade : enxerga o problema antes de virar incidente;
ComunicaГ§ГЈo clara e influГӘncia tГ©cnica, conectando times de desenvolvimento, infraestrutura e negГіcio. Conduz post-mortems orientados Г  causa raiz, aprendizado organizacional e melhoria contГӯnua, sem cultura de culpabilizaГ§ГЈo.;
Maturidade para se autogerir em remoto.

Nosso processo

Candidatura вҶ’ Entrevista tГ©cnica assistida por IA (~35 min) вҶ’ Conversa com o time de People вҶ’ Entrevista com o Diretor da ГЎrea вҶ’ Bar Raiser вҶ’ Carta oferta
```

### рҹҺҒ BenefГӯcios

рҹҺҒ O Que Oferecemos Para VocГӘ

рҹ’» AuxГӯlio Equipamento - pra garantir uma estrutura de trabalho confortГЎvel;
рҹ’ҡ Incentivo Г  saГәde - porque seu bem-estar importa;
рҹ“ҡ Incentivo aos estudos - apoiamos sua jornada de desenvolvimento contГӯnuo;
рҹҺӮ Presente de aniversГЎrio - porque gostamos de comemorar juntos;
рҹҸ… Reconhecimento por tempo de casa - sua histГіria aqui Г© valorizada;
рҹ—ЈпёҸ Incentivo a idiomas - para vocГӘ ir alГ©m das fronteiras;
рҹҸӢпёҸ TotalPass (uso exclusivo do colaborador);
рҹҢҙ Recesso remunerado apГіs 12 meses de contrato;
рҹҺү Eventos online de integraГ§ГЈo e confraternizaГ§Гөes.

### рҹӣ пёҸ Stack/Tecnologias

Cloud: AWS вҖ” EC2, VPC/redes, IAM e seguranГ§a (camada de primitiva, nГЈo sГі serviГ§o gerenciado).
Sistema e redes: Linux + redes вҖ” administraГ§ГЈo de servidor, troubleshooting real (disco, OOM, I/O, diagnГіstico de rede).
Containers: Docker em produГ§ГЈo вҖ” volumes, redes, recursos, encerramento controlado.
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, runners self-hosted (secrets, cache, gates).
Observabilidade: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, VictoriaMetrics + OpenTelemetry, PromQL, SLI/SLO.
Proxy / load balancing: nginx, HAProxy, Envoy (operaГ§ГЈo sob a camada gerenciada).

### рҹ“§ Como se Candidatar

Candidate se pelo link: https://jobs.quickin.io/ozmap/jobs/6a30025db5ba9a0013b3f162?src=LinkedIn%20Limited%20Listings

### рҹ”— Link da Vaga (opcional)

https://jobs.quickin.io/ozmap/jobs/6a30025db5ba9a0013b3f162?src=LinkedIn%20Limited%20Listings

### вң”пёҸ ConfirmaГ§ГЈo

- [x] Esta Г© uma vaga real e ativa
- [x] Li e concordo com as regras do repositГіrio
- [x] A vaga Г© relacionada Г  ГЎrea de DevOps/SRE/Cloud/Infraestrutura

items.title: [100% Remoto] Product Owner na BotCity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the worldвҖҷs top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

WeвҖҷre a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If youвҖҷre looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, weвҖҷd love for you to join us on this journey.

## DescriГ§ГЈo da vaga

The Product Owner will be responsible for driving Sentinel's product execution by translating the CTO's strategic direction into a clear, well-prioritized backlog that keeps the engineering squad focused and moving fast toward product-market fit. This person will own the full execution layer вҖ” maintaining sprint-ready user stories, removing blockers in real time, and tracking the delivery metrics that drive continuous improvement in quality and predictability. This role is built for a strong product professional who is comfortable navigating ambiguity in an early-stage environment, obsessed with delivery quality, and data-driven enough to let metrics guide process decisions вҖ” not gut feel. This position reports directly to the CTO.

## 100% Remoto


## Requisitos

**ObrigatГіrios:**

- Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Business, or related field.
- Prior experience (3+ years) in product ownership or a closely adjacent role in a tech company, ideally operating as the primary or sole PO on a product.
- Strong experience working in B2B SaaS market.
- Deep understanding of the software development lifecycle вҖ” from code changes flowing through development, staging, and production environments, through QA evaluation and release.
- Proven ability to independently own a full product backlog, including stories, acceptance criteria, dependencies and prioritization.
- Solid experience running Agile/Scrum methodologies.
- Proficient with Jira for project, backlog and sprint management.
- Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.
- Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion.
- Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
- Portuguese - Fluent.
- English - Advanced.


**DesejГЎveis:**

- Exposure to enterprise software, automation, AI agents, or developer-facing products.
- Experience working directly with a CTO or VP Engineering as primary stakeholder.
- Familiarity with product analytics tools (e.g., Mixpanel, Amplitude, Metabase).
- Working familiarity with GitHub or version control workflows.


## Incentivos

- Competitive compensation.

- 100% remote and flexible hours.
- Caju benefits card.
- Conexa health benefits.
- Opportunity to work in a global team with teams in San Francisco and SГЈo Paulo.
